title: Lively Smoky Jamaican Chicken Grill
description: Charred, tender chicken breasts infused with jerk spice and bright citrus, served with hearty roasted veggies on a raclette grill for a low‑calorie, sick‑day Jamaican treat.
instructions: Season the chicken with jerk seasoning, lime juice, soy sauce, maple syrup, and vinegar, then marinate for 10 minutes.
Heat the raclette grill to medium-high and brush a thin layer of coconut oil.
Lay the marinated chicken pieces on the grill, leaving space between them, and cook for 4 minutes on each side until charred.
Add the bell pepper, onion, and broccoli to the grill, stirring occasionally, for 6 minutes until tender.
Transfer the grilled chicken and veggies to a serving plate.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs or a squeeze of lime.
